name: Argo Investments Limited
analysis: ARG has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 4% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$8.9700. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$9.0200, stop A$8.4942, target A$10.5974 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
